sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1901" key="a)qanh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀθᾰνής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n1901.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">undying</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψυχή</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:16:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
